summary: Priority Board Unified List Styling Test Complete - All 9 features verified. The 'Coming Up' and 'On Track' sections now match the 'Next Actions' list style using consistent HighRow, MedRow, LowRow components. All sections render as vertical lists with consistent spacing, typography, and action arrows.
critical_code_review_comments: PriorityBoard.js correctly uses HighRow, MedRow, LowRow components for consistent list-row styling across all 3 sections
GRID layout changed from CSS grid to flex column (gap: 0) for all sections including 'on-track'
LowRow component correctly referenced (fixed previous 'LowCard' undefined bug)
SwipePriorityCard wraps HIGH (attention) and MED (coming-up) items with swipeable functionality
LOW (on-track) items correctly have no swipeable wrapper
All data-testids preserved for robust testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Priority Board unified list styling verified. All 3 sections (Next Actions, Coming Up, On Track) render as vertical lists with consistent styling using HighRow, MedRow, LowRow components. 5 high-attention items, 1 medium, 1 low. Swipeable wrappers (6 total) work for HIGH/MED cards. Snooze panel with 4 buttons (Tomorrow, In 3 days, Next week, Cancel) appears on swipe left. Priority/Pipeline toggle works smoothly. No empty states shown (all sections have items).

verified_features.1_three_sections_as_vertical_lists: PASS - All 3 sections (Next Actions, Coming Up, On Track) render as vertical flex-column lists
verified_features.2_section_headers_with_count_badges: PASS - Headers display: 'Next actions 5', 'Coming up 1', 'On Track 1'
verified_features.3_list_rows_display_content: PASS - Each row shows: action text, university name (separated by —), timing label, owner badge (You/Coach/Director)
verified_features.4_cta_buttons_on_right: PASS - 7 CTA buttons found, displayed on right side of each row with → arrow
verified_features.5_swipe_gestures_high_med: PASS - 6 swipeable wrappers found (5 high + 1 med). Swipe left reveals snooze panel
verified_features.6_priority_pipeline_toggle: PASS - Toggle switch works and transitions smoothly between views
verified_features.7_empty_state_messages: PASS - No empty states shown (all sections have items - correct behavior)
verified_features.8_row_click_navigation: PASS - Clicking row navigates to /pipeline/{program_id} detail page
verified_features.9_all_on_track_banner: PASS - Banner NOT visible (correct - high/med items exist)

playwright_tests_performed: Pipeline page navigation and Priority Board load verification
Verify section headers display with count badges
Verify list row content (action, university, timing, owner badge, CTA)
Verify CTA buttons appear on right side with → arrow
Verify swipeable wrappers for HIGH/MED items (6 found)
Test swipe left gesture reveals snooze panel with 4 buttons
Verify empty state messages not shown when sections have items
Verify all-on-track banner not visible when high/med items exist
Test row click navigation to program detail page
